subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received and your call was heard. Thy petition found acceptance at the Throne, for from the Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید و ندایت شنیده شد عریضه ات لدی العرش مقبول افتاد چه که از حق
subcodes.subjects: @Letters of the Living, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
